analysis.summary_en: TAIEX flat (-0.03%) but internals weak: TSMC -1.58% on no obvious local catalyst while TSM ADR was +0.38% overnight, creating a notable 1.96% divergence. Big story is UMC: ADR exploded +9.22% on stellar Q1 (profit doubled YoY, +61% QoQ) plus Intel-backed US manufacturing angle, but local 2303.TW closed -0.8% before the print/ADR reaction — setting up a likely catch-up gap higher next session. Memory/foundry tone mixed; Quanta (2382) and Hon Hai (2317) muted. Mediatek (2454) -1.53% follows TSMC weakness. Tone: mixed with foundry/AI-supplier sympathy bid building underneath.
analysis.summary_zh: 加權指數小跌0.03%但結構偏弱:台積電-1.58%而TSM ADR隔夜+0.38%,出現1.96%的明顯背離。重點是聯電:ADR暴漲9.22%,因Q1獲利翻倍年增、季增61%,加上Intel合作美國製造題材,但2303.TW本地僅-0.8%已收盤,次日很可能補漲跳空。記憶體/晶圓代工氛圍混雜;廣達(2382)、鴻海(2317)平淡。聯發科(2454)-1.53%跟隨台積電走弱。整體偏混合,但晶圓代工/AI供應鏈底部有買盤蓄勢。

key_stories.headline_en: UMC Q1 profit doubles YoY, +61% QoQ; touts Intel-backed US manufacturing option
key_stories.headline_zh: 聯電Q1淨利年增逾倍、季增61%,並提出與Intel合作美國製造方案
key_stories.analysis_en: UMC printed NT$16.17B net profit on NT$61.04B revenue, GM 29.2% — meaningfully above whisper. ADR ripped +9.22% while local already closed -0.8%, leaving 10pt divergence. The Intel/US fab narrative adds a strategic re-rating angle (capex cost concern is the offset). Read: local 2303.TW likely gaps up sharply next session; sympathy bid possible for ASE (3711) which also showed +3.16% ADR/local gap. TSMC unlikely to benefit directly — UMC strength on mature nodes is partly share-shift story.
key_stories.analysis_zh: 聯電Q1淨利161.7億、營收610.4億、毛利率29.2%,優於市場預期。ADR大漲9.22%而本地已收-0.8%,背離達10個百分點。Intel/美國設廠題材提供策略性重估空間(資本支出疑慮為反向因素)。研判:2303.TW次日很可能大幅跳空高開;日月光(3711)ADR亦領先本地3.16%,有同步補漲機會。台積電未必直接受惠,聯電成熟製程強勢部分屬市占轉移。

key_stories.headline_en: TSMC -1.58% locally despite TSM ADR +0.38% overnight — 1.96% divergence
key_stories.headline_zh: 台積電本地-1.58%但TSM ADR隔夜+0.38%,背離1.96%
key_stories.analysis_en: No specific negative catalyst in the news flow. Likely profit-taking / foreign sell program after recent strength, or pre-positioning ahead of macro/geopolitical event. Mediatek dragged in sympathy. Without a fundamental driver, the gap looks technical rather than informational — modest mean-reversion candidate if ADR holds.
key_stories.analysis_zh: 新聞面無明確利空。較可能為近期漲多後的獲利了結或外資調節,或重大事件前的減碼。聯發科同步受拖累。在無基本面催化下,此跳空偏技術性而非資訊性,若ADR守穩,有小幅均值回歸機會。

key_stories.headline_en: Hon Hai (2317) stable at -0.22% despite Luxshare cash-flow weakness flag
key_stories.headline_zh: 鴻海(2317)僅-0.22%,儘管立訊現金流轉弱訊號
key_stories.analysis_en: Luxshare (Apple competitor in China assembly) showed revenue growth but negative operating cash flow. Marginally positive read-across for Hon Hai's relative competitive position, though both face same Apple end-demand. Market correctly not over-reacting.
key_stories.analysis_zh: 立訊(中國蘋果組裝對手)營收成長但營業現金流轉負。對鴻海相對競爭地位略偏正面,但兩者同樣面對蘋果終端需求壓力。市場未過度反應屬合理。

adr_arbitrage.interpretation_en: Largest gap of the night. UMC ADR +9.22% post-earnings vs local -0.8% (closed before US session reaction). Expect 2303.TW to gap up materially at open; size of gap will reveal foreign appetite. Falsified if: (a) ADR fades overnight in late US trade, (b) negative China/geopolitical headline hits before Taiwan open, (c) profit-taking by locals who held into the print caps gap below +4%.
adr_arbitrage.interpretation_zh: 今晚最大背離。聯電ADR財報後+9.22% vs 本地-0.8%(美股反應前已收盤)。預期2303.TW開盤大幅跳空;跳空幅度將反映外資意願。否證條件:(a)ADR於美股後段回吐;(b)台股開盤前出現中國/地緣利空;(c)財報前持股的本地投資人獲利了結,將跳空壓在+4%以下。

adr_arbitrage.interpretation_en: Himax ADR +4.66% vs local +0.46%. Display driver IC strength; smaller-cap so liquidity risk. Falsified if HIMX gains were thin-volume late-day spike rather than fundamental.
adr_arbitrage.interpretation_zh: 奇景ADR+4.66% vs 本地+0.46%。顯示驅動IC題材轉強;小型股流動性需注意。否證條件:HIMX漲幅來自尾盤量縮拉抬而非基本面。

adr_arbitrage.interpretation_en: ASE ADR +1.75% vs local -1.41%. Likely partial sympathy with UMC/foundry-OSAT optimism. Modest catch-up trade candidate. Falsified if foreign net-sell on TSMC spills over into back-end names.
adr_arbitrage.interpretation_zh: 日月光ADR+1.75% vs 本地-1.41%。可能受惠於聯電/封測產業樂觀情緒。具小幅補漲機會。否證條件:外資對台積電的賣壓擴散至後段封測族群。

adr_arbitrage.interpretation_en: Mild positive divergence — local weakness without ADR confirmation suggests technical/flow-driven sell, not fundamental. Watch foreign net buy/sell tape next session.
adr_arbitrage.interpretation_zh: 輕微正向背離,本地弱勢但ADR未確認,顯示為技術面/籌碼面賣壓而非基本面。次日觀察外資買賣超。
